calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-14-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Helen Wenzel appearing via zoom for Mary Goodwin (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding the attorney fees of Mrs. Wenzel and lack of assets in the estate, and that Merrill Lynch made a mistake on distributing the assets without authority. First and Final report and account of executor etc., is taken under submission.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-24-2023 Continued To Aug-14-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-04-2022 Continued To Jun-26-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-05-2023 Continued To Jul-24-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-23-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Helene Wenzel, via Zoom, for Mary Goodwin, Petitioner.

The court advises counsel that it intends to grant the petition and asks if anyone is appearing to object. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated Mar-25-1997 and codicil dated Aug-04-1999 are admitted to probate. Mary Frances Goodwin is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jun-19-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

***Post Hearing (6/16/22): upon further consideration by the court, this matter is taken under submission pending receipt of an orginal copy of the lost will, for filing.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-23-2022 Continued To Jun-13-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
